title: [VectorCombine] Fix crash in foldEquivalentReductionCmp on i1 vector
author: SavchenkoValeriy
description: When we check for validity of `and` to `umin` fold, we check lower two bits, which leads to a crash for `i1` vectors. `i1` vectors are actually the easiest case because `or` is equivalent to `umax` and `and` is equivalent to `umin` unconditionally.

comments.author: SavchenkoValeriy
comments.body: @RKSimon thanks for a lightning fast review 🏎️
